name: Easy Laulau
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Boneless pork, beef, or chicken
4 lb Frozen luau leaves; thawed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut and discard stems from ti leaves.
2. Wash the leaves; do not dry them.
3. Cut meat into 1-inch chunks.
4. Rinse butterfish and remove skin; cut into bite-sized pieces.
5. In a large bowl, mix meat with butterfish and liquid smoke.
6. Line a large baking pan with foil.
7. Lay 3 to 4 ti leaves in the pan.
8. Add half of the luau leaves.
9. Arrange the meat mixture evenly on the luau leaves.
10. Put the remaining luau and ti leaves on top.
11. Cover the pan tightly with foil.
12. Bake in the oven at 350°F for 3 hours.
